root.str:
Celebrate the Lunar New Year of the Horse with these latest updates!
  • Lunar Horse Bundle - Have a roarsome Lunar New Year with these Lunar Horse cosmetics!
  • Returning Lunar New Year Bundles! - Year of the Horse not you? Then check out the Lunar Year of the Snake, Dragon, Rat, Ox, Tiger and Rabbit bundles!

    • Visit planetside2.com for the full patch notes.

Thank you for joining us in celebrating twenty one years of glorious battle on Auraxis!

To celebrate we've created a 21st Franchise Anniversary Bundle that is available in the Depot along with returning bundles from previous franchise anniversary's!

Whilst the new 21st Franchise Anniversary Bundle is small, our goals for Planetside 2 are much, much bigger!

To get an idea of what we are working on, take a look at the roadmap on the Planetside 2 website!
A horn made for quick and clear communication. All factions can use this gear.

Love is once again in the air, land, and seas of Auraxis.

  • Earn rewards and help the residents of Sanctuary by completing daily Matchmaker missions.

  • Show your dedication to L-O-V-E by mastering this year's Valentine's directives.

  • Pick up one of the returning limited-time camos, weapons, and cosmetics found in the Depot.


    • Missed out on previous Valentine's Directive rewards? Daybreak All-Access members will be able to purchase previous years' Directive Rewards available throughout the month.

Thermal-dampening fibers and irregular camouflage break the wearer's silhouette, concealing both heat and form. No optics. No shine. Just snow where a sniper waits. This Helmet can only be worn by TR Infiltrators.
Changes the vehicle's contrails to leave a trail of Confetti. NC use only.

Thermal-dampening fibers and irregular camouflage break the wearer's silhouette, concealing both heat and form. No optics. No shine. Just snow where a sniper waits. This Helmet can only be worn by NC Infiltrators.

Thermal-dampening fibers and irregular camouflage break the wearer's silhouette, concealing both heat and form. No optics. No shine. Just snow where a sniper waits. This Helmet can only be worn by VS Infiltrators.

An adaptive winter cloak engineered for long-range engagements. Phase-layered fabric diffuses thermal signatures and blends seamlessly with snow-covered terrain. This armor can only be worn by NC Infiltrators.
Warn your allies of the approaching cavalry with the Lunar Horse Horn. All factions can use this gear.

An adaptive winter cloak engineered for long-range engagements. Phase-layered fabric diffuses thermal signatures and blends seamlessly with snow-covered terrain. This armor can only be worn by TR Infiltrators.
Changes the vehicle's contrails to leave a trail of Confetti. NSO use only.
Customize your ground vehicle by adding the Heartstriker Hood Ornament. All factions can use this gear.

An adaptive winter cloak engineered for long-range engagements. Phase-layered fabric diffuses thermal signatures and blends seamlessly with snow-covered terrain. This armor can only be worn by VS Infiltrators.
Changes the vehicle's contrails to leave a trail of Confetti.
Changes the vehicle's contrails to leave a trail of Confetti. TR use only.
Changes the vehicle's contrails to leave a trail of Confetti. All factions can use this gear.

Applies an animated camo to your armor, weapon or vehicle. All factions can use this gear.

Members Only.

(Only Daybreak Cash purchases are account-wide).
Changes the vehicle's contrails to leave a trail of Confetti. VS use only.
